title: Better Natural Training Treats Bundle – 100% Real Meat (Chicken, Beef, Duck, Lamb), Low‑Fat, Grain‑Free, Gluten‑Free – Small, Medium & Large Dogs & Puppies, 90 g × 10 Pack
features: 100% PREMIUM REAL MEAT – Made with whole cuts of chicken, beef, duck & lamb—no by-products, fillers, artificial flavours or colours.
LOW FAT & PROTEIN-RICH – Ideal training rewards packed with protein but low in fat for a lean, energetic pet.
TAILORED TRAINING TREATS – Perfectly portioned for extended sessions; small, easy to break in half, and work great in treat-dispensing toys.
GRAIN & GLUTEN-FREE – Gentle on sensitive stomachs; wholesome ingredients you can trust.
FOR ALL DOGS & PUPPIES – Suitable for all ages, mini-mixes to suit small, medium, and large breeds.
description: Product description Treat your dog to a training experience that's both delicious and nutritious with the Better Natural Training Treats Bundle. Each 90 g pouch delivers 100% premium real meat in four mouthwatering flavours - chicken, beef, duck, and lamb - crafted without any artificial additives, grains, or gluten. Perfectly low in fat, protein-packed, and portioned just right, these treats are designed to: Reward during long training sessions without guilt. Fit in popular treat-dispensers. Support a balanced, fair-training treat routine. Key benefits: 4-flavour variety keeps pups interested and motivated. Small stick size is easy to handle and helps avoid overeating. Grain- and gluten-free formula makes them digestible for sensitive dogs. Completely natural- no by-products, fillers, or artificial nasties. Whether training a puppy or rewarding an older dog, these treats are delicious, responsible, and hassle-free. Plus, each pouch is resealable to lock in freshness. Indications All Ages Directions Keep Dry See more
